_meta.purpose: Structural validation of ontology against Beaver's audit needs (NOT high-coverage rubric)

_structural_gaps_summary.page_to_entity_map: PARTIAL — built by grep on canonical_name/aliases. Many entities have no aliases, so coverage is conservative. Beaver should treat NO_MATCH_IN_4_PAGES as 'ontology can't tell'.
_structural_gaps_summary.testable_claims_coverage: Configs are best-covered (have validation.source). Ops/Symptoms/Resolutions have NO source provenance in current ontology — major gap.
_structural_gaps_summary.missing_entity_types: No `page` entity type exists. v0.1 represents pages externally (not as ontology entities). Beaver: should `page` be a first-class entity type in v0.2?
